module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, and single-string execution invocation input guidance for step planning and composition.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates for Initial, Plan, ExecutionAnalysis, and Composition, requiring raw strict JSON without Markdown fences and single-string execution invocation inputs.
